if.test: searchKeyword != null and searchKeyword != '' and searchCondition != null and searchCondition != ''

choose.otherwise: AND (m.LOGIN_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR m.COMPANY_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS MEMBER_NO, m.MEMBER_TYPE_CD AS MEMBER_TYPE, mt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS MEMBER_TYPE_NAME, m.BRTC_CD AS REGION, m.LOGIN_ID AS MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME, m.BUSINESS_NUMBER, m.CEO_NAME, m.CEO_MOBILE_NO AS CONTACT_NUMBER, m.EMAIL, m.COMPANY_PHONE_NO AS COMPANY_PHONE, m.POSTCODE, m.ADDRESS, m.ADDRESS_DETAIL, mgr.NAME AS MANAGER_NAME, mgr.MOBILE_NO AS MANAGER_CONTACT, mgr.MOBILE_NO AS MANAGER_MOBILE, mgr.PHONE_NO AS MANAGER_PHONE, mgr.EMAIL AS MANAGER_EMAIL, cr.CREDIT_LIMIT, cr.MEAT_MONEY, NULL AS MEMBER_GRADE, NULL AS MEMBER_GRADE_NAME, m.MEMBER_STATUS_CD AS STATUS, st.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STATUS_NAME, m.AGREE_YN, ag.AGREE_MARKETING, ag.AGREE_SMS, m.JOIN_DT AS JOIN_DATE, m.USE_YN FROM TB_MEMBER m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, NAME, MOBILE_NO, PHONE_NO, EMAIL FROM TB_MEMBER_CONTACT WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND CONTACT_TYPE_CD = 'MAIN' ) mgr ON mgr.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, MAX(CREDIT_LIMIT) AS CREDIT_LIMIT, MAX(MEAT_MONEY) AS MEAT_MONEY FROM TB_MEMBER_CREDIT WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY MEMBER_ID ) cr ON cr.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN AGREE_TYPE_CD = 'MARKETING' THEN AGREE_YN END) AS AGREE_MARKETING, MAX(CASE WHEN AGREE_TYPE_CD = 'SMS' THEN AGREE_YN END) AS AGREE_SMS FROM TB_MEMBER_AGREE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY MEMBER_ID ) ag ON ag.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mt ON m.MEMBER_TYPE_CD = mt.DETAIL_CODE AND mt.GROUP_CODE = '003' AND mt.CODE = '003001' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE st ON m.MEMBER_STATUS_CD = st.DETAIL_CODE AND st.GROUP_CODE = '004' AND st.CODE = '004001'
ORDER BY m.JOIN_DT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS MEMBER_NO, m.MEMBER_TYPE_CD AS MEMBER_TYPE, mt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS MEMBER_TYPE_NAME, m.BRTC_CD AS REGION, m.LOGIN_ID AS MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME, m.BUSINESS_NUMBER, m.CEO_NAME, m.CEO_MOBILE_NO AS CONTACT_NUMBER, m.EMAIL, m.COMPANY_PHONE_NO AS COMPANY_PHONE, m.POSTCODE, m.ADDRESS, m.ADDRESS_DETAIL, mgr.NAME AS MANAGER_NAME, mgr.MOBILE_NO AS MANAGER_CONTACT, mgr.MOBILE_NO AS MANAGER_MOBILE, mgr.PHONE_NO AS MANAGER_PHONE, mgr.EMAIL AS MANAGER_EMAIL, cr.CREDIT_LIMIT, cr.MEAT_MONEY, NULL AS MEMBER_GRADE, NULL AS MEMBER_GRADE_NAME, m.MEMBER_STATUS_CD AS STATUS, st.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STATUS_NAME, m.AGREE_YN, ag.AGREE_MARKETING, ag.AGREE_SMS, m.JOIN_DT AS JOIN_DATE, m.USE_YN FROM TB_MEMBER m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, NAME, MOBILE_NO, PHONE_NO, EMAIL FROM TB_MEMBER_CONTACT WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND CONTACT_TYPE_CD = 'MAIN' ) mgr ON mgr.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, MAX(CREDIT_LIMIT) AS CREDIT_LIMIT, MAX(MEAT_MONEY) AS MEAT_MONEY FROM TB_MEMBER_CREDIT WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY MEMBER_ID ) cr ON cr.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN AGREE_TYPE_CD = 'MARKETING' THEN AGREE_YN END) AS AGREE_MARKETING, MAX(CASE WHEN AGREE_TYPE_CD = 'SMS' THEN AGREE_YN END) AS AGREE_SMS FROM TB_MEMBER_AGREE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY MEMBER_ID ) ag ON ag.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mt ON m.MEMBER_TYPE_CD = mt.DETAIL_CODE AND mt.GROUP_CODE = '003' AND mt.CODE = '003001' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE st ON m.MEMBER_STATUS_CD = st.DETAIL_CODE AND st.GROUP_CODE = '004' AND st.CODE = '004001' WHERE m.MEMBER_ID = #{value}

SELECT m.MEMBER_ID AS MEMBER_NO, m.MEMBER_TYPE_CD AS MEMBER_TYPE, mt.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS MEMBER_TYPE_NAME, m.BRTC_CD AS REGION, m.LOGIN_ID AS MEMBER_ID, m.COMPANY_NAME, m.BUSINESS_NUMBER, m.CEO_NAME, m.CEO_MOBILE_NO AS CONTACT_NUMBER, m.EMAIL, m.COMPANY_PHONE_NO AS COMPANY_PHONE, m.POSTCODE, m.ADDRESS, m.ADDRESS_DETAIL, mgr.NAME AS MANAGER_NAME, mgr.MOBILE_NO AS MANAGER_CONTACT, mgr.MOBILE_NO AS MANAGER_MOBILE, mgr.PHONE_NO AS MANAGER_PHONE, mgr.EMAIL AS MANAGER_EMAIL, cr.CREDIT_LIMIT, cr.MEAT_MONEY, NULL AS MEMBER_GRADE, NULL AS MEMBER_GRADE_NAME, m.MEMBER_STATUS_CD AS STATUS, st.DETAIL_CODE_NAME AS STATUS_NAME, m.AGREE_YN, ag.AGREE_MARKETING, ag.AGREE_SMS, m.JOIN_DT AS JOIN_DATE, m.USE_YN FROM TB_MEMBER m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, NAME, MOBILE_NO, PHONE_NO, EMAIL FROM TB_MEMBER_CONTACT WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND CONTACT_TYPE_CD = 'MAIN' ) mgr ON mgr.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, MAX(CREDIT_LIMIT) AS CREDIT_LIMIT, MAX(MEAT_MONEY) AS MEAT_MONEY FROM TB_MEMBER_CREDIT WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY MEMBER_ID ) cr ON cr.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT MEMBER_ID, MAX(CASE WHEN AGREE_TYPE_CD = 'MARKETING' THEN AGREE_YN END) AS AGREE_MARKETING, MAX(CASE WHEN AGREE_TYPE_CD = 'SMS' THEN AGREE_YN END) AS AGREE_SMS FROM TB_MEMBER_AGREE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY MEMBER_ID ) ag ON ag.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE mt ON m.MEMBER_TYPE_CD = mt.DETAIL_CODE AND mt.GROUP_CODE = '003' AND mt.CODE = '003001' LEFT JOIN TB_DETAIL_CODE st ON m.MEMBER_STATUS_CD = st.DETAIL_CODE AND st.GROUP_CODE = '004' AND st.CODE = '004001' WHERE m.LOGIN_ID = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_MEMBER ( MEMBER_TYPE_CD, BRTC_CD, LOGIN_ID, LOGIN_PW, COMPANY_NAME, BUSINESS_NUMBER, CEO_NAME, CEO_MOBILE_NO, EMAIL, COMPANY_PHONE_NO, POSTCODE, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DETAIL, MEMBER_STATUS_CD, JOIN_DT, USE_YN, AGREE_YN ) VALUES ( #{memberType}, #{region}, #{memberId}, #{loginPw}, #{companyName}, #{businessNumber}, #{ceoName}, #{contactNumber}, #{email}, #{companyPhone}, #{postcode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{status}, #{joinDate}, #{useYn}, #{agreeYn} )

INSERT INTO TB_MEMBER_CREDIT ( MEMBER_ID, CREDIT_TYPE_CD, MEAT_MONEY, CREDIT_LIMIT, CREDIT_BALANCE, USE_YN, REG_DT, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, 'DEFAULT', #{meatMoney, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{creditLimit, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{creditLimit, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, 'Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO TB_MEMBER_AGREE ( MEMBER_ID, AGREE_TYPE_CD, AGREE_YN, AGREE_DT, USE_YN, REG_DT, MOD_DT ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{agreeType}, #{agreeYn}, #{agreeDt}, 'Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT m.MEMBER_ID as memberNo, m.LOGIN_ID as memberId, m.COMPANY_NAME as companyName, m.CEO_NAME as ceoName FROM TB_MEMBER m WHERE m.MEMBER_TYPE_CD = '003001002' ORDER BY m.COMPANY_NAME
